title: Creem: America's Only Rock 'n' Roll Magazine
original_title: Creem: America's Only Rock 'n' Roll Magazine
overview: Explores the seminal music magazine from its 1969 launch in Detroit to the untimely death of its publisher Barry Kramer in 1981.
